title: puccinellia distans subsp. hauptiana
intro: Puccinellia distans subsp. hauptiana, also known as sand couch grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Puccinellia distans subsp. hauptiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
